caption:
What if the island could see you back?

There is something about the way the wild herbs and dry grasses of these shores hold a gaze — quietly, without asking for anything. High season brings its noise and its beauty, but some moments pull you away from all of it, into something still and honest. This is the other side of summer, the one that stays with you long after you leave.

@diega_paris
